string.description: The rule ID.
The Ably application ID.
The status of the rule. Rules can be enabled or disabled.

int64.description: The timeout in milliseconds for retrying the rule invocation.
The maximum number of retry attempts.

string.description: The action to take if the rule invocation fails. `REJECT` prevents the message from being published, `PUBLISH` allows it through.
The action to take if the rule invocation returns a rate limit response. `RETRY` will attempt the request again, `FAIL` will invoke the `failedAction`.

single_nested.description: Configuration for before-publish behavior, including retry logic and failure handling.

string.description: The invocation mode for this rule. Before-publish rules are invoked before a message is published.
A regular expression that filters messages based on the chat room ID. Only messages matching this pattern will trigger the rule.

custom.schema_definition: stringvalidator.RegexMatches(regexp.MustCompile("^/.*/$"), "must be a slash-delimited regular expression, e.g. /room-.*/")

string.description: The Bodyguard API key for authenticating with the moderation service.

The default language for text moderation analysis.

single_nested.description: The target for the rule, specifying the Bodyguard moderation configuration.
